# function: regbinary

Returns a tagged object representing a REG_BINARY registry value for use with regencode.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
regbinary(hex string) dynamic
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `hex` (String) Hex-encoded binary data (e.g. "48656c6c6f").
